business_profile.name: Mycelium Protocol
business_profile.description: Global IP registry with programmable licensing. Register, license, and enforce intellectual property rights on Solana.

search_catalog.description: Search available IP assets with licensing options. Filter by type, creator, territory, price range.

get_product.description: Get full details of an IP asset including all available license options, provenance chain, and pricing.

create_cart.description: Create a cart for license acquisitions. Supports multiple licenses in a single transaction.

add_item.description: Add a license template to the cart.

create_checkout.description: Create a checkout session. Returns total cost in USDC and payment options.

confirm.description: Confirm checkout and execute license acquisition. Submits Solana transactions atomically — USDC payment + royalty splits + license token minting in a single block.

link_identity.description: Link agent identity (OAuth, DID, API key) to a custodial Solana wallet for transactions.

mcp.description: Full MCP server with 11 tools for IP operations

a2a.description: A2A agent supporting task delegation for IP registration, licensing, and dispute resolution

ap2.description: Agent Payment Protocol for secure license acquisitions

ip_registration.description: Solana PDA rent for IP asset account

license_creation.description: One-time fee to create a license template

license_acquisition.description: Set by IP owner per license template
